title: Navigating the Future of AI: A Policy and Ethics Roadmap
description: A flowchart illustrating the key decision points, potential outcomes, and ethical considerations for governing AI development in the near future. It maps the cause-and-effect relationship between policy choices and societal impacts.
elements: AI Development Trajectory (e.g., Open vs. Restricted)
Societal Outcomes (Positive: Healthcare breakthroughs; Negative: Mass surveillance)
External Forces (e.g., Geopolitical competition, Public opinion)
relationships: Policy Levers directly influence the AI Development Trajectory
The AI Development Trajectory, guided by Ethical Guardrails, leads to Societal Outcomes
External Forces exert pressure on and interact with Policy Levers and the Development Trajectory
Societal Outcomes create feedback loops that influence future Policy Levers and Ethical Guardrails
